subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-25 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: This sort of peace is one of the exigencies of this age. Though all the Prophets of God have summoned humankind to peace and unity
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینگونه صلح از مقتضیات این عصر است و هر چند جمیع انبیای الهی خلق را بصلح و یگانگی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @universal peace; world unity, @spiritual transformation
